creator: yoshiaki@kt.rim.or.jp
text:
This is new release version Mikmod. Many bugs fixed.
	Some new features. But there are few documentations.
	You can find documentations in MikMod 3.0.3 archive.

	Licenses are changes, LGPL (for library) and GPL.

Fix: 

---
  yoshiaki@kt.rim.or.jp
  Yoshiaki UCHIKAWA--NIwCzr4mNdzYTfT9Ij8uTgEi4FNQr48xRrdcSMF1zBq6Kbfr
